hero-subtitle: A frontend engineer who spends as much time in a darkroom or practicing Japanese as I do in VS Code.
hero-cta: Checkout my V4 Homepage (work in progress)!
about-me-content:
Skilled software developer with a passion for creating innovative solutions.
Strong foundation in multiple programming languages and technologies.
Focused on creating intuitive and user-friendly user interfaces.
Experienced in building web applications from front to back end, and dedicated to delivering high-quality, reliable, and efficient code, whether working on a team or independently.
collaboration: Best fit for frontend work, design systems, and product teams that care about the details.
bento-description: I build websites and apps that are clear, fast, and pleasant to use.
status-availability-title: Open to selected freelance work and studying N1 kanji.
bench-subtitle: A short version of what I care about when building.
bench-manifesto-body: I try to make interfaces easy to understand, quick to use, and honest about what they do.
